pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["Nodejs Release 为各平台提供预编译的 nodejs 和 npm 等二进制文件，是 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://nodejs.org/dist/","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://nodejs.org/dist/"}]," 的镜像。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["可以手工选择下载所需的版本，也可以搭配 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"n"}]," 或者 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"fnm"}]," 等版本管理器使用，方法如下："]}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"n","children":"n"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"fnm","children":"fnm"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"volta","children":"volta"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["创建或编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.volta/hooks.json"}]," (Linux/MacOS)，或 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%LOCALAPPDATA%\Volta\hooks.json"}]," (Windows)，将内容替换如下"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"json"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["之后即可正常使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"volta"}]]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"nvm","children":"nvm"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"nvs","children":"nvs"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"mise","children":"mise"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
